steps: Go to https://app.pipedrive.com/settings/api (or navigate to your profile icon > Company Settings > Personal Preferences > API tab)
Log in with your Pipedrive account
Your API token is displayed on this page under 'Your personal API token'
Copy the token and use it as the x-api-token request header
notes: Each user has one API token per company; tokens are user-specific and company-specific
A user belonging to multiple companies will have a different token for each company
Generating a new token invalidates the previous one
Use the header: x-api-token: <your_token> for all requests
Free trial available for 14 days; paid plans start at ~$14/user/month
API rate limits: 100 requests per 10 seconds per token

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve the current authenticated user's Pipedrive profile
